'''Brophar Tofarain''' was a civilian mechanic who joined the crew of the ''[[FarStar]]'' during the hunt for [[Moff/Legends|Moff]] [[Kentor Sarne]].

==Biography==
===Early life and Kal'Shebbol===
After achieving the rank of [[Sergeant/Legends|sergeant]] in a planetary militia in the [[Mid Rim/Legends|Mid Rim]], Tofarain spent several years traveling the space lanes as a starship mechanic. He eventually made his way to [[Kal'Shebbol/Legends|Kal'Shebbol]], where he opened a repair facility. He made a fortune working for free-traders and [[Smuggler/Legends|smugglers]], and even did some work for Moff Sarne.

Tofarain lost his business to an errant [[Concussion missile/Legends|concussion missile]] during the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic's]] liberation of Kal'Shebbol. However, Tofarain and his staff survived since they had taken shelter in a nearby tavern.

===Service onboard the ''FarStar''===
In his typically outspoken and pushy style, he demanded a spot on the ''FarStar'' as compensation for his loss. To his mind, if the New Republic couldn't reimburse him with [[Galactic Credit Standard/Legends|credits]], then they owed him enough to take him on the voyage since he had nowhere else to go. He offered his services as a mechanic, transport chief, and shuttle pilot. To sweeten the deal, he offered to lend his personal ship, the ''[[Muvon]]'', to the mission for transport duties.

Alongside the [[Wookiee/Legends|Wookiee]] [[Lofryyhn]], Tofarain maintained the ''FarStar''{{'s}} starfighters and support ships, and assisted with technical support on ground missions.

==Personality and traits==
Tofarain was the stereotypical mechanic - slightly pudgy, gruff, and constantly covered in grime. Convinced that he was best mechanic on the ''FarStar'', he would often insist on doing major repair jobs himself rather than delegate them to subordinates. He didn't trust others to do the work correctly, and often found fault in the work of others.

He also liked to dole out advice on everything, including how the ''FarStar'' mission should be run. While the crew respected his advice on technical manners, they ignored his advice regarding command decisions.

Tofarain's greatest concern was to see as much of the [[Galaxy/Legends|Galaxy]] as he could before taking his [[List of phrases and slang/Legends#F|final jump]]. Because of this, he insisted on piloting the ''Muvon'', claiming that no one else could handle his ship properly. In reality, it was his excuse to see new worlds, get in on some action, and maybe score some credits.

The ''Muvon'' was Tofarain's pride and joy, and he was extremely attached to the vessel. When it was stolen by [[Gorak Khzam]], Tofarain swore revenge on the [[Rodian/Legends|Rodian]].
